metadata.notes: Partner contribution (ingest) specifications with published documentation online. Entries without public technical specs are omitted from the catalog. US broadcast/cable parents: broadcast-cable-parents.json. MVPD/distributor platforms: distributor-platform-services.json.

services.name: Amazon Prime Video
services.tagline: Studio partner and Prime Video Direct
services.description: Amazon accepts H.264, ProRes 422, and MPEG-2 mezzanine files for studio partners. Prime Video Direct offers a self-serve upload path for independent rights holders.
services.accessModel: Partner delivery or Prime Video Direct

deliveryOptions.name: H.264 HD Mezzanine
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 High Profile in MP4, M2T, or TS with AAC or AC-3 embedded audio.

videoSpecs.label: Container
videoSpecs.value: MP4, M2T, or TS (.mov not supported for H.264)

containerSpecs.label: Audio rule
containerSpecs.value: All tracks same language; program audio only (no M&E/MOS)

containerSpecs.label: Loudness
containerSpecs.value: Approximately −24 to −26 LKFS (ITU-R BS.1770)

deliveryOptions.name: H.264 HD with AC-3 5.1
deliveryOptions.summary: Same H.264 video spec with Dolby Digital (AC-3) 5.1 embedded audio.

containerSpecs.label: Channel mapping
containerSpecs.value: L-R-C-LFE-LS-RS required for 5.1

deliveryOptions.name: ProRes 422 HQ Mezzanine
deliveryOptions.summary: Apple ProRes 422 HQ in MOV with lossless PCM audio.

containerSpecs.label: GOP
containerSpecs.value: Not applicable (I-frame only)

deliveryOptions.name: AVOD HD (Ad-Supported Prime / legacy Freevee)
deliveryOptions.summary: Same Prime Video mezzanine family as SVOD — ads are inserted at playback. Former Freevee content now lives in Prime Video AVOD.

videoSpecs.label: Codec
videoSpecs.value: AVC/H.264 High Profile or ProRes 422 HQ

videoSpecs.label: Bitrate
videoSpecs.value: 30 Mbps HD H.264; ~220 Mbps ProRes 422 HQ

audioSpecs.label: Codec
audioSpecs.value: AAC or AC-3 embedded; PCM for ProRes

containerSpecs.label: Business line
containerSpecs.value: Prime Video AVOD (includes migrated Freevee library)

containerSpecs.label: Packaging
containerSpecs.value: Bulk delivery with MMC metadata via Video Central

additionalNotes: Amazon Freevee shut down March 2025; AVOD content moved into Prime Video ad tier.
Source mezzanine spec matches SVOD — difference is monetization/metadata, not video codec.

deliveryOptions.name: TVOD — Prime Video Direct (Rent/Buy)
deliveryOptions.purpose: Independent rent/buy titles via Prime Video Direct
deliveryOptions.summary: Self-serve path for rights holders to list transactional titles. H.264 MP4 is the most common upload format.

containerSpecs.label: Access
containerSpecs.value: Prime Video Direct web upload or bulk Aspera/S3

containerSpecs.label: Revenue
containerSpecs.value: 50% rental/purchase revenue share (typical)

services.revenueModel: Prime SVOD subscription, ad-supported streaming (AVOD), and rent/buy (TVOD)
businessModelNotes: Amazon Freevee merged into Prime Video AVOD in March 2025.
AVOD, SVOD, and TVOD share the same mezzanine spec family but different packaging/metadata paths.
Prime Video Direct supports self-serve TVOD for rights holders.

services.name: Apple TV+
services.description: Apple TV and Movies content is delivered as an iTunes Package (.itmsp) using Apple's Transporter tool. Mezzanine sources use ProRes; consumer deliverables use H.264 or HEVC.

deliveryOptions.name: HD TV Source (ProRes 422 HQ)
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ mezzanine in QuickTime with LPCM audio for Apple TV catalog.

audioSpecs.label: Layouts
audioSpecs.value: Stereo or 5.1 with defined channel assignments

containerSpecs.label: Delivery
containerSpecs.value: .itmsp package via Transporter

containerSpecs.label: Captions
containerSpecs.value: CEA-608/708 or iTunes Timed Text (.itt)

deliveryOptions.name: 4K TV Source (ProRes 422 HQ)
deliveryOptions.summary: 4K UHD ProRes 422 HQ source profile for Apple TV+ premium placement.

videoSpecs.label: Bitrate
videoSpecs.value: ~880 Mbps (422 HQ), up to ~2000 Mbps (4444 XQ)

videoSpecs.label: HDR
videoSpecs.value: Dolby Vision preferred for premium tier

audioSpecs.label: Premium
audioSpecs.value: Dolby Atmos (E-AC-3 JOC) plus 5.1 and stereo fallbacks

containerSpecs.label: Consumer encode
containerSpecs.value: H.264 or HEVC in final .itmsp deliverable

deliveryOptions.name: HEVC Consumer Deliverable
deliveryOptions.summary: H.265/HEVC for 4K and HDR final deliverables within Apple's package workflow.

audioSpecs.label: Codec
audioSpecs.value: AAC-LC stereo and Dolby Digital Plus 5.1

containerSpecs.label: Tooling
containerSpecs.value: Apple Transporter and Compressor workflows

services.revenueModel: Apple TV+ subscription and transactional iTunes/Apple TV purchases
businessModelNotes: Apple TV+ originals use ProRes mezzanine; iTunes transactional uses H.264/HEVC in .itmsp packages.

services.name: Hulu
services.description: Hulu requires mezzanine files that decode cleanly through their transcode pipeline. ProRes 422 HQ is the preferred QuickTime format; MPEG-2 is also accepted.

deliveryOptions.name: QuickTime ProRes 422 HQ
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ in MOV with interleaved PCM audio muxed with primary language.

videoSpecs.label: Bitrate
videoSpecs.value: ~220 Mbps at 1080p HQ, ~880 Mbps at 4K HQ

containerSpecs.label: Requirement
containerSpecs.value: Video muxed with primary-language audio

containerSpecs.label: SDR only
containerSpecs.value: HDR mezzanines require Content Partner Manager approval

additionalNotes: Same mezzanine serves Hulu (With Ads) and Hulu (No Ads) — ad tier is a subscription wrapper.

deliveryOptions.name: MPEG-2 Mezzanine
deliveryOptions.summary: MPEG-2 mezzanine with PCM, MPEG Layer II, or AC-3 audio.

containerSpecs.label: Format
containerSpecs.value: MPEG-2 program stream or transport stream

deliveryOptions.name: H.264 Mezzanine
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 in MP4/MOV at 10–40 Mbps for partner workflows accepting AVC.

containerSpecs.label: Scan
containerSpecs.value: Progressive only, constant frame rate

services.revenueModel: Hulu subscription with ad-supported and ad-free tiers
businessModelNotes: Hulu (With Ads) and Hulu (No Ads) use the same mezzanine master — ads are inserted at playback, not in the source file.
Hulu Live TV linear uses separate CableLabs/MPEG-TS ingest (not covered by mezzanine specs here).

services.name: Max
services.description: Licensed studios and distributors deliver finished masters TO Max via the WBD Content Partner Hub or Automated Content Delivery (ACD). Specs cover mezzanine ingest for the Max catalog — not WBD outbound syndication to affiliates.
services.accessModel: WBD Content Partner Hub / ACD onboarding required

deliveryOptions.name: HD/UHD SDR Mezzanine (ProRes 422 HQ)
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ in QuickTime MOV with embedded 24-bit PCM audio — preferred SDR ingest path for licensed content.

audioSpecs.label: Layouts
audioSpecs.value: Stereo/dual mono, 5.1, and M&E per contract; embedded in master

audioSpecs.label: Loudness
audioSpecs.value: −24 LKFS/LUFS ±2 dB (ITU-R BS.1770); true peak ≤ −2 dBTP

containerSpecs.label: Composition
containerSpecs.value: Episodic: slate + program @ 01:00:00:00 + textless; theatrical: continuous program

containerSpecs.label: Delivery
containerSpecs.value: WBD secure portal upload or ACD with MovieLabs MMC metadata

deliveryOptions.name: HD SDR (AVC-Intra MXF)
deliveryOptions.summary: AVC-Intra in MXF OP1a at CBR — one of five approved SDR master formats.

containerSpecs.label: Frame rate
containerSpecs.value: Native constant frame rate only

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: AVC-Intra MXF OP1a requires broadcast authoring tools; FFmpeg libx264 does not produce AVC-Intra essence.

deliveryOptions.name: HDR (IMF JPEG 2000)
deliveryOptions.summary: HDR titles delivered TO Max as IMF Application #2E with JPEG 2000 essence and Dolby Vision metadata.

audioSpecs.label: Atmos
audioSpecs.value: Immersive Audio Bitstream (IAB) in MXF when mixed in Atmos

audioSpecs.label: Beds
audioSpecs.value: 2.0, 5.1, and Atmos printmasters per IMF configuration

audioSpecs.label: PCM
audioSpecs.value: 48 kHz, 24-bit linear PCM in IMF audio tracks

containerSpecs.label: Delivery
containerSpecs.value: Automated Content Delivery (ACD) with MMC metadata

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: HDR IMF packages require specialized mastering tools, not a single FFmpeg output.

services.revenueModel: Max DTC subscription; content acquired from licensed partners
businessModelNotes: These specs are for delivering content TO Max — not WBD outbound syndication to affiliates.
Onboarding via Content Partner Hub or ACD is required before any production delivery.

services.name: Netflix
services.description: Netflix requires licensed partners to deliver finished masters as Interoperable Master Format (IMF) packages. Editorial turnovers to Content Hub accept H.264, ProRes, or DNxHD for review workflows.

deliveryOptions.name: Branded IMF Delivery (4K/UHD)
deliveryOptions.summary: IMF Application #2E with JPEG 2000 video, 24-bit PCM audio, and timed text sidecars.

videoSpecs.label: Color
videoSpecs.value: Rec. 2020 container, P3-D65 mastering; Dolby Vision for HDR

audioSpecs.label: Layouts
audioSpecs.value: 2.0, 5.1, and Dolby Atmos (IAB) when mixed in Atmos

audioSpecs.label: Loudness
audioSpecs.value: True peak ≤ −2.3 dBTP on beds/objects (2024 spec update)

containerSpecs.label: Package
containerSpecs.value: IMF CPL + asset map + MXF track files

containerSpecs.label: Subtitles
containerSpecs.value: TTML sidecars (not burned-in)

additionalNotes: Netflix derives 2.0, 5.1, and Atmos printmasters from IMF when configured.
FFmpeg cannot author a complete IMF package; use IMF-capable mastering tools.
deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: JPEG 2000 IMF is a package-level delivery format, not a single FFmpeg-authored file.

deliveryOptions.name: Content Hub Editorial (H.264)
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 in MP4 or MOV with AAC or embedded PCM for Content Hub workflows.

audioSpecs.label: MP4/MOV option
audioSpecs.value: HE-AAC, HE-AACv2, or AAC-LC at 48 kHz

containerSpecs.label: Requirement
containerSpecs.value: Embedded audio required

deliveryOptions.name: Content Hub Editorial (ProRes 422 HQ)
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ or ProRes 4444 in QuickTime MOV with embedded PCM.

videoSpecs.label: Codec
videoSpecs.value: Apple ProRes 422 HQ or ProRes 4444 (not XQ)

containerSpecs.label: Requirement
containerSpecs.value: Embedded audio required

services.revenueModel: Subscription (SVOD) via licensed content deals
businessModelNotes: No public upload path. All delivery is partner-gated.
Content Hub editorial specs are proxy/review formats — not consumer-facing streams.

services.name: Paramount+
services.description: Paramount+ subscription service (Essential with ads, Premium ad-free). Licensed partners deliver ProRes mezzanine masters — distinct from Pluto TV AVOD specs.

deliveryOptions.name: Paramount+ SVOD Mezzanine (ProRes 422 HQ)
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ with embedded PCM stereo or 5.1 when available.

videoSpecs.label: Codec
videoSpecs.value: Apple ProRes 422 HQ (preferred for Pluto TV)

videoSpecs.label: Requirement
videoSpecs.value: Seamless program — no bars, slates, or textless at head/tail

containerSpecs.label: Dubs/AD
containerSpecs.value: Additional languages as discrete .WAV sidecars

services.revenueModel: Paramount+ subscription (Essential with ads, Premium ad-free tiers)
businessModelNotes: Paramount+ SVOD mezzanine specs differ from Pluto TV AVOD — see Pluto TV entry.
Essential tier includes ads but uses the same library masters as Premium.

services.name: PBS Distribution
services.description: PBS Distribution (PBSd) delivers public media content to PBS Passport, Amazon, Apple, and other OTT platforms. Requires ProRes or DNxHD mezzanine with strict caption and split-track audio rules.
services.accessModel: PBS producer / distributor via Aspera Faspex
services.revenueModel: Public media licensing; PBS Passport member SVOD
businessModelNotes: PBSd masters feed multiple downstream OTT platforms — specs are distributor-centric, not platform-specific.
PBS Passport is member-benefit SVOD; broadcast master specs apply to station feed separately.

deliveryOptions.name: HD Mezzanine (ProRes 422 HQ)
deliveryOptions.purpose: HD deliverable for OTT and international syndication
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ preferred; DNxHD MXF OP1a 175+ Mbps acceptable alternative.

audioSpecs.label: Split tracks
audioSpecs.value: Discrete .wav sidecars for dubs and AD

containerSpecs.label: Delivery
containerSpecs.value: Aspera Faspex only — no SFTP/Dropbox

containerSpecs.label: UHD
containerSpecs.value: Matching HD file required when delivering UHD

deliveryOptions.name: UHD Mezzanine (ProRes 422 HQ / 4444)
deliveryOptions.summary: UHD ProRes 422 HQ or 4444; HDR10 requires matching SDR file.

videoSpecs.label: HDR
videoSpecs.value: HDR10 required format; Rec. 2100 color space

audioSpecs.label: Requirement
audioSpecs.value: Same 5.1 + stereo rules as HD master

containerSpecs.label: Rule
containerSpecs.value: Do not upscale — deliver native resolution only

services.name: Peacock
services.description: Peacock and NBCUniversal content delivery uses ProRes 422 HQ as the primary mezzanine codec, with XDCAM as a secondary option for HD.

deliveryOptions.name: HD ProRes 422 HQ
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ at 1920×1080 with discrete PCM audio tracks.

containerSpecs.label: UHD HDR
containerSpecs.value: Separate UHD HDR-10 and Dolby Vision specs available

deliveryOptions.name: UHD SDR ProRes 422 HQ
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ at 3840×2160 UHD with Rec. 709 color.

containerSpecs.label: HDR
containerSpecs.value: ProRes 4444 for HDR-10; ProRes 4444 XQ for Dolby Vision

deliveryOptions.name: Peacock AVOD / Digital Ad Creative
deliveryOptions.purpose: Peacock Free tier and NBCU digital ad placements
deliveryOptions.summary: Peacock Free and Premium (with ads) use the same NBCU library mezzanine for long-form. Short-form ad creatives use compressed H.264.

videoSpecs.label: Long-form library
videoSpecs.value: Same ProRes 422 HQ mezzanine as SVOD tier

containerSpecs.label: Ad tier note
containerSpecs.value: Peacock ad vs ad-free tiers differ in playback, not mezzanine for library content

services.revenueModel: Peacock Free (AVOD), Premium, and Premium Plus (SVOD) tiers
businessModelNotes: Peacock ad and ad-free tiers share the same NBCU mezzanine — ad insertion is a business/playback layer.
Peacock Live sports/events may use separate live ingest workflows.

services.name: Plex
services.description: Plex Free Movies & Shows is AVOD; Plex also supports TVOD rentals via catalog metadata. Partners deliver via JSON catalog feeds — video specs are negotiated per deal but align with standard AVOD H.264 delivery.
services.revenueModel: AVOD ad revenue share and TVOD rentals
businessModelNotes: Plex catalog JSON defines monetization_type as "ads" (AVOD) or "rentals" (TVOD).
Video encoding specs are partner-negotiated — no single public mezzanine PDF.

deliveryOptions.name: AVOD Catalog (H.264)
deliveryOptions.summary: Standard H.264 delivery for Plex AVOD catalog entries (monetization_type: ads).

containerSpecs.label: Metadata
containerSpecs.value: JSON VOD catalog with availabilities, quality (sd/hd/fhd/uhd), monetization_type

containerSpecs.label: Catalog refresh
containerSpecs.value: Every 2 hours via API key-authenticated feed

deliveryOptions.name: TVOD Rental (H.264)
deliveryOptions.summary: Transactional titles use monetization_type: rentals in Plex catalog with price/currency fields.

videoSpecs.label: Quality tiers
videoSpecs.value: sd / hd / fhd / uhd per catalog quality enum

containerSpecs.label: Metadata
containerSpecs.value: price and price_currency required for rentals

services.name: Pluto TV
services.description: Pluto TV is Paramount Global's free streaming service combining FAST linear channels and AVOD on-demand library. Specs are more accessible than Paramount+ SVOD — ProRes preferred but H.264 also accepted.
services.revenueModel: Free AVOD with ad revenue share; FAST linear channels
businessModelNotes: Pluto TV AVOD specs differ from Paramount+ SVOD mezzanine requirements.
FAST linear channels may use HLS origin feeds in addition to flat-file VOD.

deliveryOptions.name: AVOD VOD Mezzanine (ProRes 422 HQ)
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ preferred for Pluto TV VOD. Seamless program required — no slates or bars.

videoSpecs.label: Alternative
videoSpecs.value: H.264 High Profile in MP4/MOV also accepted

containerSpecs.label: Requirement
containerSpecs.value: Picture-to-picture seamless — no bars/tone/slate

containerSpecs.label: Dubs
containerSpecs.value: Additional languages as discrete .WAV sidecars

deliveryOptions.name: AVOD VOD (H.264)
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 alternative when ProRes mezzanine is unavailable — lower barrier than Paramount+ SVOD.

containerSpecs.label: vs Paramount+
containerSpecs.value: Pluto accepts H.264 more readily than Paramount+ SVOD mezzanine path

services.name: Samsung TV Plus
services.description: Samsung TV Plus is a FAST service built into Samsung Smart TVs. Content is delivered as HLS adaptive streams — not single flat files. Specs define origin ladder bitrates and manifest requirements.
services.revenueModel: Free FAST with ad insertion (SSAI)
businessModelNotes: No flat-file VOD upload — origin HLS streams required.
DTS audio is NOT supported on 2024+ Samsung TVs — use AAC only.

deliveryOptions.name: FAST HLS Origin — 1080p top rung
deliveryOptions.summary: Top H.264 rung of Samsung TV Plus recommended HD ladder at 1920×1080 / 6.5 Mbps.

audioSpecs.label: Codec
audioSpecs.value: AAC — no DTS on 2024+ Samsung TVs

containerSpecs.label: Manifest
containerSpecs.value: Valid BANDWIDTH, CODECS, RESOLUTION tags required

containerSpecs.label: SSAI
containerSpecs.value: Samsung CDN with server-side ad insertion

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: Samsung TV Plus requires multi-bitrate HLS origin — Applies to the 1080p top HLS rung only.

deliveryOptions.name: FAST HLS Origin — HEVC 1080p top rung
deliveryOptions.purpose: HEVC HD FAST channel (required in some regions)
deliveryOptions.summary: HEVC ladder for regions requiring H.265 — lower bitrates than H.264 equivalent.

videoSpecs.label: Regions
videoSpecs.value: HEVC required in some territories (e.g. Brazil)

containerSpecs.label: Manifest
containerSpecs.value: hvc1 codec ID; parameter sets in sample descriptions

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: HLS multi-bitrate packaging required — Single-bitrate planning for the top HLS rung.

services.name: The Roku Channel
services.description: The Roku Channel combines AVOD on-demand and FAST linear on Roku devices. Partners contribute catalog H.264 MP4 via MRSS/JSON feeds, ProRes mezzanines for acquired originals, or MPEG-TS linear feeds TO Roku OVP (often via Amagi, Wurl, or other certified partners).
services.revenueModel: Free AVOD with ad revenue share; FAST linear channel ingest
businessModelNotes: AVOD catalog specs (H.264 MP4) differ from acquired-original mezzanine specs (ProRes).
Linear live ingest uses separate OVP MPEG-TS specifications.

deliveryOptions.name: AVOD Catalog (H.264 MP4)
deliveryOptions.summary: Standard H.264 MP4/MOV for AVOD catalog — similar to Tubi and other FAST/AVOD platforms.

videoSpecs.label: Container
videoSpecs.value: MP4 or MOV; HLS/DASH also accepted via aggregators

videoSpecs.label: HDR
videoSpecs.value: Dolby Vision, HDR10, HDR10+ on capable devices (4K titles)

containerSpecs.label: Captions
containerSpecs.value: SRT or WebVTT sidecars

containerSpecs.label: Feed
containerSpecs.value: MRSS or JSON Content Feed via Roku-approved aggregator

deliveryOptions.name: Acquired Originals Mezzanine (ProRes)
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 HQ or 4444 XQ mezzanine for Roku Originals — much higher spec than AVOD catalog.

audioSpecs.label: Layout
audioSpecs.value: 5.1 + stereo on interleaved or mono tracks

containerSpecs.label: Sidecar audio
containerSpecs.value: WAV preferred for dubs; interleaved sidecar supported

deliveryOptions.name: Linear Live Ingest (OVP)
deliveryOptions.purpose: FAST linear channels via Roku OVP
deliveryOptions.summary: Live linear channels on The Roku Channel require MPEG-TS over IP through Roku's Online Video Platform.

videoSpecs.label: Codec
videoSpecs.value: H.264 preferred; MPEG-2 and H.265 also supported

containerSpecs.label: Captions
containerSpecs.value: CEA-608/708 embedded

containerSpecs.label: Ad markers
containerSpecs.value: Splice_insert for ad insertion points

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: Live MPEG-TS ingest is a continuous stream — flat-file FFmpeg commands are Planning reference only.

services.name: Tubi
services.description: Tubi accepts standard web-delivery formats, making it one of the most accessible AVOD platforms for independent distributors. Content is reviewed via automated preflight QC.

deliveryOptions.name: HD H.264 Delivery
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 High Profile in MP4 or MOV with AAC or AC-3 audio and sidecar captions.

containerSpecs.label: Captions
containerSpecs.value: SRT or VTT required (English for US)

containerSpecs.label: QC
containerSpecs.value: No slates, color bars, or test tones at head/tail

services.revenueModel: Free AVOD with ad revenue share to licensors
businessModelNotes: Tubi specs are intentionally accessible — H.264 web delivery, not ProRes mezzanine.
Automated preflight QC rejects slates, test tones, and insufficient bitrates.

services.name: Vimeo
services.description: Vimeo recommends H.264 or HEVC uploads with AAC audio. Enterprise and OTT partners may have additional mezzanine requirements.

deliveryOptions.name: 1080p H.264 Upload
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 in MP4/MOV with AAC stereo — Vimeo's recommended upload format.

containerSpecs.label: Scan
containerSpecs.value: Progressive preferred

services.revenueModel: Creator subscriptions (Vimeo OTT), enterprise licensing, and hosted upload tiers
businessModelNotes: Vimeo OTT enterprise partners may have stricter mezzanine requirements than standard creator uploads.

services.name: Xumo
services.description: Xumo Play is a FAST service from the Comcast/Charter joint venture. Channel operators deliver a 24/7 H.264 HLS origin feed TO Xumo for playout on Xumo Play and syndication through Xumo Enterprise.
services.revenueModel: Free FAST with programmatic and direct ad sales
businessModelNotes: You contribute an HLS origin TO Xumo — not a flat-file upload.
Default master playlist bitrate ~1 Mbps (Xumo recommends lower than Apple's 2 Mbps default).

deliveryOptions.name: FAST HLS Linear Channel
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 High Profile HLS with ≥5 video profiles for mobile through smart TV.

videoSpecs.label: Segments
videoSpecs.value: 3–10 seconds (6 seconds recommended); IDR at segment start

audioSpecs.label: Tracks
audioSpecs.value: One video + one audio per transport stream

containerSpecs.label: I-frames
containerSpecs.value: Additional I-frames every 2 seconds within segments

containerSpecs.label: Restriction
containerSpecs.value: No ID3 or SCTE-35 data tracks in transport stream

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: FAST HLS requires multi-profile ladder — 1 Mbps reflects Xumo default variant for planning.

services.name: Amagi
services.description: Amagi CLOUDPORT is a cloud playout platform used by content owners to ingest media, schedule 24/7 linear channels, and deliver TO FAST platforms (Roku, Samsung, LG, Vizio, and 50+ destinations). You contribute files or live feeds TO Amagi — Amagi transcodes and routes to each streamer's requirements.
services.revenueModel: SaaS playout + managed services; ad revenue share on distributed channels
businessModelNotes: Amagi is a distribution intermediary — you deliver TO Amagi, not directly to every OEM.
Amagi auto-transcodes to each downstream platform's spec after your master ingest.
Roku lists Amagi as a linear-certified partner for The Roku Channel.

deliveryOptions.name: CLOUDPORT File Ingest (Mezzanine)
deliveryOptions.summary: Upload mezzanine files to Amagi CLOUDPORT for cloud playout scheduling. Supports MXF, MOV, MPG, and TS with AVC/HEVC video.

videoSpecs.label: Workflow
videoSpecs.value: S3/MAM upload or hybrid on-prem ingest to CLOUDPORT

containerSpecs.label: Output
containerSpecs.value: Amagi playout generates HLS/MPEG-TS/SRT to each FAST destination

containerSpecs.label: QC
containerSpecs.value: Automated ingest QC with error reporting

additionalNotes: Exact mezzanine profiles are confirmed during Amagi onboarding — CLOUDPORT accepts most broadcast mezzanine formats.
Amagi transcodes downstream; deliver the highest-quality master you have.
deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: Models a typical HD mezzanine contributed TO Amagi before downstream transcoding.

deliveryOptions.name: CLOUDPORT Live Contribution (SRT/TS)
deliveryOptions.purpose: Live or linear backhaul to cloud playout
deliveryOptions.summary: Live contribution over SRT, RTP, RIST, Zixi, or AWS Elemental MediaConnect into Amagi LIVE / CLOUDPORT switcher.

videoSpecs.label: Protocols
videoSpecs.value: SRT, RTP/RTP-FEC, RIST, Zixi, NDI, ST 2110 JPEG-XS

videoSpecs.label: Use case
videoSpecs.value: News, sports, and live event segments in FAST linear channels

audioSpecs.label: Codecs
audioSpecs.value: AAC, AC-3, E-AC-3 embedded in transport

containerSpecs.label: Redundancy
containerSpecs.value: Dual MediaConnect paths supported for live resilience

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: 12 Mbps HD CBR models a typical live contribution feed TO Amagi before ladder generation.

services.name: Wurl
services.description: Wurl Global FAST Pass ingests content and linear streams FROM partners, then packages and delivers TO 50+ CTV platforms (Roku, Samsung TV Plus, LG Channels, Vizio, and others). Contribution specs cover MRSS/VOD mezzanine files, TVBits metadata delivery, and HLS restream origins.
services.revenueModel: Channel-based distribution SaaS; ad monetization via Wurl AdPool
businessModelNotes: You deliver TO Wurl — Wurl handles transcoding, scheduling, EPG, SSAI, and platform handoff.
MRSS feeds must reference publicly reachable mezzanine URLs (no auth tokens).
Minimum 1920×1080 source required for Wurl-originated HLS playout channels.

deliveryOptions.name: MRSS + Mezzanine MP4 Ingest
deliveryOptions.summary: Publish an MRSS feed pointing to high-quality MPEG-4 mezzanine files on your origin. All items must meet Wurl Mezzanine Asset Spec.

videoSpecs.label: Media URL
videoSpecs.value: Public HTTP(S) MPEG-4 mezzanine per item (no signed URLs)

videoSpecs.label: Content types
videoSpecs.value: Movies, series, TV specials, short-form video

audioSpecs.label: Captions
audioSpecs.value: SCC or SRT sidecar via wurl:closedCaptions MRSS tag

containerSpecs.label: Metadata
containerSpecs.value: Genres, ratings, TMS IDs, license windows, and platform-specific genre tags

containerSpecs.label: Loudness
containerSpecs.value: Wurl playout normalizes originated channels to −24 LKFS

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: Typical FAST mezzanine contribution before Wurl transcodes for each downstream platform.

deliveryOptions.name: HLS Restream Contribution (Linear)
deliveryOptions.summary: Contribute a continuous HLS origin (restream channel) TO Wurl for CDN redistribution. Minimum 1920×1080 input; H.264 + AAC.

videoSpecs.label: Bitrate
videoSpecs.value: VBR adaptive; Wurl generates up to 5 renditions

videoSpecs.label: Frame rate
videoSpecs.value: Normalized to 30 fps for most Wurl-originated playout

audioSpecs.label: Loudness
audioSpecs.value: Address irregularities at origin for restream channels (not normalized by Wurl)

containerSpecs.label: Captions
containerSpecs.value: WebVTT and/or embedded CEA-608 in HLS

containerSpecs.label: Workflow
containerSpecs.value: Restream channels skip Wurl ingest/scheduling — faster launch

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: 1080p top-rung planning bitrate for HLS origin contributed TO Wurl.

deliveryOptions.name: TVBits File Delivery (CSV + Assets)
deliveryOptions.summary: Deliver pre-cut video files with CSV metadata for Wurl TVBits — used to populate FAST channel blocks.

videoSpecs.label: Metadata
videoSpecs.value: Wurl Bits CSV template with exact Video Filename matching

videoSpecs.label: Filenames
videoSpecs.value: No spaces or special characters; must match CSV exactly

videoSpecs.label: Channel link
videoSpecs.value: Channel Slug column ties bits to a FAST channel

audioSpecs.label: Captions
audioSpecs.value: SCC or SRT sidecars; 0-aligned to video; UTF-8

containerSpecs.label: Entry types
containerSpecs.value: movie, tvSpecial, shortFormVideo, or series with season/episode

services.name: LG Channels
services.description: LG Channels is the free FAST service built into LG webOS TVs. Partners contribute HLS linear streams and JSON channel/EPG metadata TO LG (often via Amagi, Wurl, or other certified FAST partners).
services.accessModel: LG content partner / certified FAST distributor
services.revenueModel: Free FAST with ad insertion on LG TVs
businessModelNotes: Direct contribution is partner-gated — most channels reach LG via Wurl, Amagi, or similar.
H.264 streams should use a maximum of four reference frames on LG webOS.
Audio-only HLS variants are not supported — every stream must include video.

deliveryOptions.name: FAST HLS Origin Contribution
deliveryOptions.purpose: 24/7 linear FAST channel on LG TVs
deliveryOptions.summary: Contribute an HLS linear stream TO LG Channels with companion JSON channel and schedule metadata.

videoSpecs.label: Protocol
videoSpecs.value: HLS (RFC 8216); MPD also referenced in LG metadata spec

videoSpecs.label: Reference frames
videoSpecs.value: Maximum 4 reference frames recommended for H.264 stability

audioSpecs.label: Codec
audioSpecs.value: AAC or HE-AAC in the same transport stream as video

containerSpecs.label: Metadata
containerSpecs.value: JSON channel, program, and schedule data via HTTP

containerSpecs.label: CODECS tag
containerSpecs.value: Required in #EXT-X-STREAM-INF for proper variant selection

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: Multi-bitrate HLS ladder required — 5 Mbps models a common HD origin contribution.

services.name: Vizio WatchFree+
services.description: WatchFree+ is Vizio's free FAST service on SmartCast TVs. Content partners contribute channels and libraries TO Vizio Platform+ — typically through certified FAST distributors (Wurl, Amagi, Xumo) rather than direct flat-file upload.
services.revenueModel: Free FAST with ad revenue share on Vizio devices
businessModelNotes: Contribution is partner-managed — contact Vizio Platform+ for onboarding.
Most FAST channels reach WatchFree+ via Wurl Global FAST Pass or Amagi distribution.
Specs mirror common CTV HLS origin requirements once routed through a certified partner.

deliveryOptions.name: Platform+ HLS Channel Contribution
deliveryOptions.summary: Deliver a 24/7 H.264/AAC HLS origin through your FAST distribution partner for inclusion on WatchFree+.

videoSpecs.label: Typical path
videoSpecs.value: Contribute TO Wurl/Amagi → syndicated TO Vizio WatchFree+

videoSpecs.label: SSAI
videoSpecs.value: Server-side ad insertion at platform/partner layer

containerSpecs.label: Metadata
containerSpecs.value: Channel branding, EPG, and artwork via partner onboarding

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: HD HLS origin top-rung planning bitrate before partner transcoding to WatchFree+.

deliveryOptions.name: Platform+ VOD / FAST Library (via partner)
deliveryOptions.summary: VOD libraries are ingested through Platform+ partners using MRSS or mezzanine file delivery — same patterns as Wurl MRSS ingest.

videoSpecs.label: Delivery
videoSpecs.value: MRSS feed or mezzanine MP4 via certified partner

containerSpecs.label: Artwork
containerSpecs.value: 16:9 thumbnails and channel logos required

services.name: Frequency
services.description: Frequency Studio ingests VOD assets and live HLS/RTMP origins FROM content partners, then playouts linear FAST channels TO 200+ CTV distributors. Roku lists Frequency as a certified linear partner alongside Amagi and Wurl.
services.revenueModel: Channel origination SaaS; ad-supported FAST distribution
businessModelNotes: Frequency transcodes most ingested files to its output spec — deliver a clean HD master rather than a full ladder.
Preferred delivery is MRSS with linked assets; S3, Dropbox, and manual upload also supported.
Live programs require 1080p HLS or RTMP pull with a single rendition (not a full ABR ladder).

deliveryOptions.name: Studio VOD File Ingest
deliveryOptions.purpose: Movies, episodes, and short-form in linear FAST schedules
deliveryOptions.summary: Contribute MP4/MOV/MXF mezzanine files via MRSS, S3, or manual upload. Frequency accepts H.264/HEVC and ProRes with sidecar captions.

videoSpecs.label: Containers
videoSpecs.value: MP4, MOV, AVI, MPG, MXF, MKV

videoSpecs.label: Video codecs
videoSpecs.value: H.264/AVC or H.265/HEVC (preferred); ProRes 422/444 and HD422 also accepted

containerSpecs.label: Captions
containerSpecs.value: Sidecar SRT, SCC, VTT, STL, SMI, or TTML; embedded CEA-608/708 on track 0

containerSpecs.label: Thumbnails
containerSpecs.value: PNG or JPG, minimum 1280×720 at 72 dpi

containerSpecs.label: Metadata
containerSpecs.value: Title (≤255 chars), description, genre mapped to Frequency taxonomy

additionalNotes: Frequency transcodes on ingest unless a bypass is negotiated with Operations.
MRSS is the preferred delivery method; CSV/Excel metadata manifests also supported.
deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: 15 Mbps models a mid-quality 1080p master contributed TO Frequency before platform transcoding.

deliveryOptions.name: Live Program HLS Contribution
deliveryOptions.purpose: Scheduled live events and manual playout override
deliveryOptions.summary: Contribute a single-rendition HLS or RTMP pull feed at 1080p for live program switching in Frequency Studio.

videoSpecs.label: Protocols
videoSpecs.value: HLS Pull (HTTPS, single rendition) or RTMP Pull

videoSpecs.label: Compatibility
videoSpecs.value: Input must match Frequency playout output specifications

videoSpecs.label: Preparation
videoSpecs.value: Live feeds can be prepared up to 1 hour before scheduled start

containerSpecs.label: HLS note
containerSpecs.value: Provide one rendition only — full ABR ladders break live switching

deliveryOptions.ffmpegNotes: Live HLS contribution planning for a single 1080p rung TO Frequency.

services.name: YouTube
services.description: YouTube accepts a wide range of upload formats and re-encodes for adaptive streaming. Recommended upload settings prioritize H.264 or HEVC in MP4/MOV with high-quality AAC audio.

deliveryOptions.name: 1080p SDR Upload
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 High Profile in MP4/MOV — the most common YouTube upload path.

videoSpecs.label: Container
videoSpecs.value: MP4, MOV, AVI, WMV, FLV, WebM

containerSpecs.label: Color
containerSpecs.value: Rec. 709 for SDR; upload HDR as HEVC/VP9/AV1

deliveryOptions.name: 4K UHD Upload
deliveryOptions.summary: 4K uploads benefit from H.264 or HEVC at higher bitrates.

videoSpecs.label: HEVC bitrate
videoSpecs.value: Lower than H.264 at equivalent quality

containerSpecs.label: Max resolution
containerSpecs.value: Up to 8K supported

deliveryOptions.name: VP9 WebM Upload
deliveryOptions.summary: VP9 in WebM with Opus audio for YouTube and other Google services.

containerSpecs.label: Use case
containerSpecs.value: YouTube re-encodes all uploads regardless of source codec

services.revenueModel: Free ad-supported viewing, YouTube Premium SVOD, and creator monetization
businessModelNotes: YouTube re-encodes all uploads — source file specs are upload recommendations, not playback guarantees.
YouTube Premium removes ads but uses the same uploaded source.
distributorWorkflowAliases: YouTube Channels - Program extract for ME
